fieldValues.value: Text Projection includes only searchable valueType fields; number, boolean, date are excluded

The Text Projection MUST include only fields with searchable valueTypes: string, text, url, select, multiselect. Fields with valueType of number, boolean, or date MUST NOT contribute segments to the Text Projection. When a TypedRecord field has no valueType declared, the implementation MUST emit a segment only if the stored value is a JSON string or JSON array; all other non-string, non-array values are skipped.

Boolean true/false and raw numbers are not useful search tokens and would produce false positives. Dates require range predicates not covered by this RFC. The searchability classification is class-wide (by valueType) rather than per-field, keeping projection stateless and avoiding the need for per-field searchability flags.
